title: Leaked AWS Access Key in Environment File
description: An AWS Access Key ID was found committed in a .env file. This key could provide access to AWS cloud resources including S3, EC2, and IAM.

title: Database Connection String with Credentials
description: A PostgreSQL connection string containing username and password was found in a configuration file. This provides direct database credentials to anyone with repository access.

title: GitHub Personal Access Token Leaked
description: A GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) was found in a script file. This token could grant access to private repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and organizational resources.
